advice.summary: You are progressing well with your interval training and maintaining a consistent training schedule. Keep focusing on building endurance while managing fatigue levels.
advice.focus: Incorporate more variety in your easy runs to enhance recovery and prevent monotony.
advice.nextSession: Plan for an easy run of about 6-8 km at a comfortable pace, focusing on form and breathing.
advice.caution: Monitor heart rate during workouts to avoid overtraining, especially with high-intensity sessions.
